name: Gazpacho Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium green pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Instead of blending the vegetables to make the traditional soup, stop at the chopping phase and serve as a salad.
2. Combine the first six ingredients in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
3. Combine all ingredients for the Herb Dressing and mix or whisk until thoroughly blended.
4. Pour dressing over the vegetables; toss gently.
5. Chill at least 2 hours.
6. Arrange lettuce leaves on serving platter. Spoon salad over leaves and serve.
Yield: 5 servings
One Serving: 1/2 cup Calories: 57 Protein: 2 g Fat: 3 g Carbohydrate: 7 g Fiber: 2.8 g Cholesterol: 0 mg Sodium: 34 mg Potassium: 335 mg Exchange: 1 Vegetable 1/2 Fat
